chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2580 of 2021 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on Misc No.11202/2021. 2. For orders on office objection No.18. 3. For orders on Misc No.11203/2021. 4. For orders on Misc No.11204/2021. 5. For hearing of main case. 22.04.2021 Mr. Abdul Wahab Baloch advocate. ************* 1) Urgency granted. 2) Deferred for the time being. 3) Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5) Basically, the petitioners are seeking regularization of their service in respondent-Board of Intermediate Education Karachi, in the terms of 176th Meeting of the Board held on 08.06.2015. It is, inter-alia, contended that the petitioners would be satisfied if directions are issued to the respondent-Board to strictly follow the said clause-b of the aforesaid resolution, which is available on page 197. It is further urged that the petitioners have been serving in the respondent-Board since 2015 and waiting for their regularization of service but the respondents are not paying heed towards their genuine request. Per learned counsel, the respondent-Board has already regularized the services of their colleagues but they have been deprived of such benefit of regularization. In support of his contention, he relied upon the order dated 24.09.2018 passed by this Court in C.P No.D-3591/2018 page 203 and argued that the case of the petitioners is akin to the case of their colleagues decided by this Court as discussed supra. He prays for notice. If this is the position of the case, let notice be issued to the respondents as well as to learned AAG for 27.05.2021 with direction to file comments.
He prays for notice. If this is the position of the case, let notice be issued to the respondents as well as to learned AAG for 27.05.2021 with direction to file comments. JUDGE JUDGE
